description: 5 features, 2 classes. Minimise NegCRAIndex (= maximise CRA-Index) and SolutionLength.

reference_front.notes: Optimal CRA=1.5 in minimum 2 moves. cohesion(C1)=1.0, cohesion(C2)=1.0, coupling(C1→C2)=0.5.
Initial state. cohesion(C1)=4/6≈0.667, no coupling. All 1-move neighbours are strictly worse.

validation.pass_condition: The found front must contain at least one solution with NegCRAIndex ≤ -1.5 and SolutionLength ≤ 2, and at least one solution with NegCRAIndex ≤ -0.667 and SolutionLength = 0.

notes: The 1-move intermediate state C1={m1,m2,a1,a2} / C2={m3} gives CRA=0.25 which is dominated by the initial state. The reference front therefore has only 2 points.
